rawAssistant: A tight schedule, eh? If you plan to rush off before dawn, make sure those Hollowfen wardstones are properly secured – it'd be a shame if the flood washed them away while you're gone. Check their anchors and any loose stones; don't want your hard work getting swept away in the morning's misty light.
